name: odoo-mcp-connector
description: Vision Lighting Odoo connector — staging (full), live read-only, and live restricted-write MCP servers, plus PDFMonkey datasheet generation.

odoo_username.title: Odoo login email
odoo_username.description: Your Odoo login email — used for both staging and live.

live_url.title: Live Odoo URL
live_url.description: Base URL of the live instance, e.g. https://your-company.odoo.com

live_db.title: Live database name
live_db.description: Live database name (ask your Odoo admin if unsure).

live_api_key.title: Live API key
live_api_key.description: API key generated on the LIVE instance (Settings > My Profile > Account Security > API Keys).

staging_url.title: Staging Odoo URL
staging_url.description: Base URL of the staging instance, e.g. https://your-company-staging.dev.odoo.com (leave blank to skip staging).

staging_db.title: Staging database name
staging_db.description: Staging database name (leave blank to skip staging).

staging_api_key.title: Staging API key
staging_api_key.description: API key generated on the STAGING instance (leave blank to skip staging).

pdfmonkey_api_key.title: PDFMonkey API key
pdfmonkey_api_key.description: Required only for datasheet generation. Leave blank if you don't generate datasheets.

pdfmonkey_template_id.title: PDFMonkey template ID
pdfmonkey_template_id.description: The PDFMonkey datasheet template ID. Required only for datasheet generation.
